title: Interior Designers
description: Plan, design, and furnish the internal space of rooms or buildings. Design interior environments or create physical layouts that are practical, aesthetic, and conducive to the intended purposes. May specialize in a particular field, style, or phase of interior design.

tasks.text: Design plans to be safe and to be compliant with the American Disabilities Act (ADA).
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Use computer-aided drafting (CAD) and related software to produce construction documents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research health and safety code requirements to inform design.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with client to determine factors affecting planning of interior environments, such as budget, architectural preferences, purpose, and function.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise client on interior design factors, such as space planning, layout and use of furnishings or equipment, and color coordination.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate with other professionals, such as contractors, architects, engineers, and plumbers, to ensure job success.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Review and detail shop drawings for construction plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Inspect construction work on site to ensure its adherence to the design plans.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Render design ideas in form of paste-ups or drawings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Subcontract fabrication, installation, and arrangement of carpeting, fixtures, accessories, draperies, paint and wall coverings, art work, furniture, and related items.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select or design, and purchase furnishings, art work, and accessories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Estimate material requirements and costs, and present design to client for approval.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research and explore the use of new materials, technologies, and products to incorporate into designs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design spaces to be environmentally friendly, using sustainable, recycled materials when feasible.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Formulate environmental plan to be practical, esthetic, and conducive to intended purposes, such as raising productivity or selling merchandise.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and design interior environments for boats, planes, buses, trains, and other enclosed spaces.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
